message:
feat(webhook): add webhook notification delivery module (wa-psm.1)

Implements webhook notification delivery with configurable payload templates
for Slack, Discord, and generic JSON endpoints. Uses a trait-based transport
abstraction (WebhookTransport) so wa-core stays free of HTTP client deps.

- WebhookEndpointConfig: URL, template, event patterns, custom headers
- WebhookPayload: structured payload from Detection + RenderedEvent
- Template rendering: generic (flat JSON), Slack (Block Kit), Discord (embeds)
- WebhookDispatcher: endpoint matching, template selection, delivery recording
- WebhookTransport trait: abstract HTTP POST for pluggable implementations
- Extended NotificationConfig with webhooks endpoint list
- Made match_rule_glob pub for cross-module use
- 22 new tests with mock transport (payload, templates, dispatcher, config)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
